reviews.name: Viviana
reviews.text: Neyle made a nervous client feel comfortable, worked carefully with challenging brows and checked that she loved the result.

reviews.name: Rut
reviews.text: A great powder-brow appointment and a very positive experience.

reviews.name: Fernanda
reviews.text: Very pleased with the brow-lamination result.

reviews.name: Guest
reviews.text: Happy with the lash lift and especially appreciative of the kind service.

reviews.name: Daira
reviews.text: Neyle was warm, explained the process clearly and earned an enthusiastic recommendation.

reviews.name: Donna
reviews.text: The technician worked thoughtfully with very short lashes and created an experience worth returning for.

reviews.name: Ashley
reviews.text: Professional, beautiful work in a clean and welcoming studio.

reviews.name: Aminatou
reviews.text: A sweet, professional service and an experience the client loved from start to finish.

reviews.name: Vicmar
reviews.text: Loved both the result and Neyle’s positive attitude, with a strong recommendation for the studio.
